subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1913-03-16 in Paris
subcodes.first_line: The Ottomans still do not know what must be done, despite their full knowledge that their present position affords them
subcodes.first_line_orig: عثمانیها هنوز نمیدانند چه باید کرد با آنکه حال بخوبی میتوانند مخالفین خود را در حالت
subcodes.subjects: @critique of Eastern values; culture, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
